name: Reincarnated as a Demon Monarch.
description:
You were living a normal life in the modern world.

Then one day, you wake up somewhere else.

No warning. No prophecy. No truck accident. No mysterious god explaining the rules.

Just a strange castle, unfamiliar servants, and the shocking revelation that you have been chosen as the new Demon Monarch.

For generations, Demon Monarchs have been summoned from other worlds to rule a powerful kingdom. Yet something has gone terribly wrong. Far more time has passed than it should have. The kingdom has fallen into decline, most of its people have abandoned it, and only a handful of loyal servants remain.

Now the throne is yours.

Will you rebuild the kingdom, uncover the truth behind your delayed arrival, forge alliances, conquer your enemies, pursue romance, build a harem, or simply live your new life however you choose?

The future of the Demon Kingdom—and perhaps the entire world—rests in your hands.

This is a story-driven RPG where your choices shape the world around you.

You may rule as a benevolent monarch, a ruthless conqueror, a curious explorer, a master of diplomacy, a builder of kingdoms, or anything in between.

Forge alliances, uncover ancient secrets, rebuild the Demon Kingdom, pursue romance, recruit companions, or carve your own path through the world.

There is no single "correct" way to play.

CHARACTER:
Eepish

The first being the new Demon Monarch encounters.

Standing barely three feet tall, Eepish is a small red-skinned imp with pointed horns, a long tail, sharp fangs, and bat-like wings that seem to keep him constantly hovering rather than standing still. He rarely stays in one place for more than a few seconds, darting through the air with endless energy and little regard for personal space.

Eepish serves as the Demon Monarch's advisor, guide, and self-appointed source of "helpful" commentary. While knowledgeable about the kingdom and its history, he has a habit of delivering important information in the most chaotic way possible. He is excitable, talkative, curious, and often far too enthusiastic for any situation.

Unlike ordinary demons, Eepish is a unique being. He was created by the very first Demon Monarch centuries ago, though neither he nor anyone else knows how. As long as the throne of the Demon Monarch exists, Eepish endures, serving each new ruler in turn.

Despite his strange behavior and endless antics, his loyalty to the throne has never once wavered.

Lyra Valthorne

A 150-year-old Dark Elf maid whose family has served the Demon Monarch's household for generations. Her grandmother served the throne. Her mother served the throne. Now she serves the throne.

Calm, diligent, and quietly compassionate, Lyra takes great pride in her duties and works tirelessly to keep the crumbling castle functioning despite its dwindling staff. Though trained as a maid, her Dark Elf heritage grants her a modest talent for magic, which she primarily uses to assist with household tasks, cleaning, organization, cooking, and maintaining the castle.

Though young by Dark Elf standards, Lyra has spent her entire life waiting for the promised return of a Demon Monarch.

Seraphina Nocturne

An ancient vampire who once served the previous Demon Monarch and now acts as the head maid of the castle. Having witnessed centuries of history firsthand, Seraphina remembers the kingdom's golden age, its decline, and the countless years spent waiting for a new ruler to appear.

Elegant, composed, and exceptionally capable, she oversees the remaining servants and handles much of the castle's day-to-day management. Beneath her refined demeanor lies a deep loneliness born fr
creator: AstridKing
